targets.query:
from(bucket: "occ")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "building")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "path", "location"])
  |> group(columns: ["path", "location"])

from(bucket: "occ")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "building")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "relative_humidity")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "path", "location"])
  |> group(columns: ["path", "location"])

from(bucket: "occ")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "building")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power_mw")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "path", "location"])
  |> group(columns: ["path", "location"])

from(bucket: "occ")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "building")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "path", "location"])
  |> group(columns: ["path", "location"])
